news.title: Watch: Trump speaks at G7 summit after threatening Iran
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump says he will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal. Trump made the comments at the G7 conference.

news.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
news.summary: JetBlue is planning to cut crew bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and New York's LaGuardia Airport. JetBlue plans to cut staff bases at New Jersey, New York airports.

news.title: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
news.summary: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday. The company has raised more than $1 billion in its first two days of trading.

news.title: Trump sabotages Senate bid to fast-track Clayton as DNI
news.summary: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.

news.title: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
news.summary: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure. Allbirds is a maker of shoes with an artificial intelligence program called Allbirds AI.

news.title: Retail investors have been buying more SpaceX shares than all of the ‘Magnificent Seven’ combined
news.summary: Retail investors net bought $369.8 million worth of SpaceX stock in the first three days of trading. The company is expected to go public later this year.

news.title: The $124 trillion Great Wealth Transfer is real — but the IRS or a nursing home might get your family’s money first
news.summary: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.

news.title: We read the Social Security and Medicare trustees reports. If you’re not worried, you should be.
news.summary: The GOP is trying to pass a bill that would cut Social Security and other benefits. The bill would also cut the number of people who are eligible for benefits.

news.title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
news.summary: Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report says 2013 was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers.

news.title: Here’s how stocks performed under different Fed chairs — and how much influence Warsh really has
news.summary: A look at stock-market performance under Fed chairs going back to the 1930s. The U.S. stock market is up more than 7% this year. The S&P 500 is up about 2%.
